name: RABBIT-BUG-3
title: migration left double-nested RABBIT-CAGE-1/RABBIT-CAGE-1/ under .claude/bugs/
description: During the rabbit-bug impl migration (cp -r from docs/bugs/ to .claude/bugs/rabbit-cage/), RABBIT-CAGE-1 was double-nested: .claude/bugs/rabbit-cage/RABBIT-CAGE-1/RABBIT-CAGE-1/bug.json exists alongside the correct .claude/bugs/rabbit-cage/RABBIT-CAGE-1/bug.json. Root cause: cp -r source already contained RABBIT-CAGE-1 as a subdir. Fix: rm -rf .claude/bugs/rabbit-cage/RABBIT-CAGE-1/RABBIT-CAGE-1.

history.note: [skip-vet: data-only artifact deletion, no code change; verified dir no longer exists] Deleted .claude/bugs/rabbit-cage/RABBIT-CAGE-1/RABBIT-CAGE-1/ via python3. RABBIT-CAGE-1/bug.json is correct; inner duplicate is gone.
